category_sources: Official GitHub repository describes krep as a fast text search tool with advanced algorithms, SIMD acceleration, multithreading, and regex support.
source_facts.description says krep is a high-performance string search utility.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository name is davidesantangelo/krep.
docs_sources: source_facts.repo already identifies the official GitHub repository; its README is the best official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo was intentionally not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official GitHub repository description mentions text search, regex support, and large-scale pattern matching.
